creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Regular ports committer mat@ asked me to stop attaching Poudriere build logs a while ago.

The fix is for non-Poudriere builds where misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid is installed.  In Poudriere, the issue doesn't surface.

If you insist I can provide a build log on Tuesday.  :)


Cheers,
Franco
